category_registry.definition: General integrity issue in reference governance or reference-surface clarity.
The evidence layer is too thin, incomplete, or not yet strong enough for broader retrieval or reporting claims.
A micro-teaching unit may need split, merge, retirement, scope review, or promotion decision.
A source extraction or overlay is incomplete enough that broad metadata backfill would be risky.
A generated report or diagnostic projection may not fully reflect the underlying source state.
A source, curriculum, blueprint, or exam-program version boundary is not yet explicit enough.
A unit or term lacks a canonical link or exemption needed for reference/RAG trust.
A prerequisite edge or zero-needs classification is missing, weak, or still review-bound.
The data is useful internally but not ready for student-facing, production teacher-facing, or automated use.

issues.title: Remaining empty-needs backlog needs explicit classification

evidence_refs.note: Reports the current live-unit empty-needs count and status distribution.

issues.next_action: Review remaining empty-needs units and record true-zero, underbouw-assumed, or explicit prerequisite decisions through the approved reference workflow.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Every live empty-needs unit has an approved zero_needs_status or a validated prerequisite list, and the needs-coverage report no longer contains unclassified empty-needs units.

issues.title: Term-link gaps need procedure-only versus missing-term classification

evidence_refs.note: Reports live units without canonical term links.
RX.2 added procedure/instrument A-domain units that intentionally may not have concept terms yet.

issues.next_action: Split term-link reporting into true missing canonical term links and intentionally procedure-only unit exemptions.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Term-link reports separate procedure-only exemptions from concept-bearing units missing canonical term slugs.

issues.title: RX.2 representation units are generator-blocked

evidence_refs.note: Tracks the six catalog-valid RX.2 units as non-interactive until generator implementation and validation.

issues.next_action: Implement and validate GEN_A61, GEN_A66, GEN_A67, GEN_A70, GEN_A72, and GEN_A74 before any student-facing skill-tree exposure.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Generator implementations exist, generator coverage validation passes, and a later sprint explicitly approves student-facing skill-tree exposure.

issues.title: Tier A source-annex extraction gap blocks broad exam overlay backfill

evidence_refs.note: Records the CP-3 source-annex extraction gap before broad Tier A overlay extension.

issues.next_action: Add source-annex extraction workflow or require explicit source_values_not_extracted records with proof-to-close before broad Tier A overlay backfill.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Tier A overlays that require annex/source values either extract those values or carry explicit reviewed gap records with proof-to-close.

issues.title: Evidence anchor coverage remains thin for broad RAG trust

evidence_refs.note: Reports the current evidence-anchor and claim counts.
R7.4 allowed internal and limited teacher-facing use only with evidence-surfacing conditions.

issues.next_action: Backfill evidence anchors for high-traffic units, terms, target exercises, and retrieval-evaluation failure modes before expanding use.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Evidence-anchor coverage report shows materially improved coverage for high-traffic retrieval surfaces and no result implies evidence where none exists.

issues.title: Curriculum and source-version registry remains future work

evidence_refs.note: R14.1 remains the planned minimal curriculum versioning sprint.

issues.next_action: Implement R14.1 minimal curriculum versioning before retrieval/reporting can safely mix multi-year source surfaces.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Current external, machine, authored, and owned-source surfaces carry explicit source/curriculum version provenance and stale-reference reporting exists.

issues.title: D04 unit-design decision and CLI retirement completed

evidence_refs.note: Sprint 9 and CP-5 retain D04 split/retire/redistribute review before D-domain promotion.
CP-5 closed as pass_with_conditions with D04 redistribution and later CLI retirement direction.
S9a deprecated D04 through unit-deprecate.js with successor replacement pointers.

issues.next_action: No further R8-QC-007 action; keep deprecated D04 out of active promotion dependencies.
issues.proof_required_to_close: CP-5 gate closure, S9a CLI mutation log, and stale-reference audit exist.

issues.title: Reference-health report must stay aligned with QC issue model

evidence_refs.note: Dashboard state should expose the internal QC issue model without treating it as curriculum authority.

issues.next_action: Regenerate reference health after R8.1 and verify it includes an internal-only quality_issue_model summary.
issues.proof_required_to_close: Reference-health JSON includes quality_issue_model with internal_only true, curriculum_authority false, and student_facing_exposure false.
